all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (87 MB) cached in ~/.cache/huggingface/hub/. No on-disk FAISS index built yet — the stored index would add 50-150 MB after first full indexing run.

key_findings: All databases are << expected range — system has minimal real data
No FAISS/semantic index found — embedding model cached externally (87 MB)
venv is 181 MB vs expected 300-600 MB — smaller because no heavy ML libs (torch, transformers) installed in venv; they're in ~/.cache
Source code (core + tests + routers) = ~8 MB — within expected 15-25 MB when including docs, configs, artifacts
codegraph_artifacts at 1.2 MB vs expected 10-30 MB — only reference output; full scan would grow
summary.verdict: ACCEPTABLE_VARIANCE — all deviations are from development/empty state, not architectural inconsistency
